dependencies: Reliance on third-party suppliers and manufacturers for active pharmaceutical ingredients and final products
Single source providers for raw materials and manufacturing supplies
Third-party contract manufacturing organizations for fill-finish and final product assembly
Certain early processes for SKYCLARYS rely on a single supplier based in China
One contract manufacturer for IMRALDI and BENEPALI was acquired by a third party in December 2024
risks: Manufacturing is complex and subject to regulatory hurdles
Persistent manufacturing or supply chain difficulties may prevent meeting demand
Global supply chain disruptions including port strikes, work stoppages, port congestion
Geopolitical tensions including US-China tensions, Russia-Ukraine conflict, Middle East military conflict
Tariffs, trade protection measures, import/export licensing requirements
Supply chain disruptions from global health outbreaks, adverse weather events, labor or raw material shortages
Difficulty in securing alternative suppliers due to specialized nature and regulatory approval requirements

regulatory_risks: FDA and foreign regulatory agency approval processes and potential delays
Changes in FDA and foreign regulations requiring additional safety monitoring, labeling changes, or restrictions
Extensive legal and regulatory requirements affecting healthcare industry including fraud and abuse laws
Anti-kickback laws and false claims laws scrutiny
Government regulation of pharmaceutical pricing and reimbursement
Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) provisions including government negotiation of drug prices and Medicare Part D redesign
State laws requiring disclosure of pharmaceutical pricing and marketing expenditures
Foreign anti-corruption laws including FCPA and UK Bribery Act
Data privacy and security requirements including GDPR and CCPA
Climate-related disclosure requirements including EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive and California environmental disclosure laws
Biosimilar approval pathway uncertainties and potential changes if PPACA is repealed or modified
Patent term extensions and regulatory exclusivity uncertainties
Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) compliance and regulatory inspections
Good Clinical Practices (GCP) compliance for clinical trials
EU Clinical Trial Regulation requirements
Combination product regulations for biologics and devices
Environmental regulations including safe working conditions, hazardous substances handling, water supply and wastewater discharge permits
Sanctions and export control compliance
Pillar Two global minimum tax rate implementation (OECD GloBE Model Rules)
Potential changes to healthcare reform and government reimbursement policies

sanction_risks: Sanctions and restrictions on Russia due to invasion of Ukraine
US-China tensions leading to tariffs and sanctions on imports from China
Retaliatory tariffs imposed by China on US imports
Business restrictions and trade sanctions affecting international operations
New government sanctions on export of manufacturing materials to Russia may delay product approvals
Geopolitical tensions may increase cybersecurity threats
